steps.title: Identify what word the blank requires
steps.content: The passage states we must work with climate using computer models that represent various climate conditions. The blank describes what the models do to those conditions: they reproduce or mimic them. We need a verb meaning to imitate a real system.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice and confirm the answer
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'invent': Invent means to create something new. A model that "invents" climate conditions would fabricate them rather than reproduce real ones. ✗
  • Choice B — 'simulate': Simulate means to imitate or reproduce a system. Computer models that simulate climate conditions replicate real-world behavior — exactly what the passage describes. ✓
  • Choice C — 'exaggerate': Exaggerate means to overstate. A model that exaggerates conditions distorts rather than accurately represents them. ✗
  • Choice D — 'preserve': Preserve means to keep something unchanged. This implies storing conditions, not modeling their behavior. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
